message:
test(conformance): add budget conformance tests

Implements 22 conformance tests for the Budget type with product semiring semantics:

Deadline tests (bd-001 through bd-006):
- Construction and access
- Expiration detection (now >= deadline)
- Inheritance via meet (min/tighter wins)
- Remaining time calculation
- None + Some combination
- Runtime timeout as deadline proxy

Poll quota tests (pq-001 through pq-006):
- Construction and access
- Poll consumption decrements quota
- Exhaustion detection (quota == 0)
- Inheritance via meet (min wins)
- Zero quota is immediately exhausted
- Unlimited quota (u32::MAX)

Cost quota tests (cq-001 through cq-006):
- Construction and access
- Cost consumption decrements quota
- Exhaustion detection (Some(0))
- Inheritance via meet (min wins)
- Unlimited quota (None) allows any consumption
- Over-consumption fails

Combined budget tests (cb-001 through cb-004):
- All dimensions combined independently
- INFINITE is identity element
- ZERO absorbs all constraints
- Priority uses max (not min)

All tests include spec section references (§3.2.x).

Resolves: asupersync-mlrb

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
